  "findings": [
    "Service disconnect was pulled but the mandatory capacitor discharge wait time was bypassed.",
    "Zero-energy state verification was not performed prior to starting work on high-voltage components."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Wait the OEM-specified discharge time (typically 5 to 10 minutes).",
    "Verify zero-energy state using a properly rated Category III/IV digital multimeter and appropriate PPE."
  ],
  "rationale": "Working on high-voltage systems immediately after pulling the service disconnect without waiting for capacitor discharge and verifying a zero-energy state poses an immediate, life-threatening electrocution hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OEM HV Safety Procedures",
    "NFPA 70E Article 120 (Establishing an Electrically Safe Work Condition)"
  ]
}
